summary:
Only two sentences:

The agent concludes that while no studies directly show irradiation altering gut microbiota, its routine application in gastrointestinal cancers and diseases affecting intestinal structures creates strong indirect support.  
Radiation causes localized tissue damage and immune/inflammatory response within the digestive system, leading to plausible disruption of bacterial ecosystems present in the gut lumen and associated niches.

Only include content strictly related to the core medical issue raised; avoid generalizations beyond what was discussed.
